title: Just Vanilla
description: A super lightweight client-side modpack focused on optimization and quality of life improvements. Works with vanilla servers!
body:
---

✨ The Ultimate Vanilla-Friendly Experience ✨

Keep it simple. Keep it fast. Keep it vanilla.

--- ### 🪓 Ever wanted a modpack that… - Keeps the **pure vanilla** feel? - Works perfectly on **multiplayer servers without mods**? - Focuses on **optimization and QoL** instead of bloat? > Then **Just Vanilla** is for you! 🎉 --- ### 💡 What it’s made for: - 🧭 Playing on **vanilla servers** - 🪶 Players who want a **smooth, lag-free** experience - 🌱 New players looking for the **classic Minecraft vibe** - 💻 Anyone who wants **performance + polish**, not extra content > I personally use this pack whenever I hop on vanilla servers — it just *works.* ---
📜 Mod List (click to expand) - [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling) - [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) - [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats) - [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) - [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - [Smooth Scrolling](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-scroll) - [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) - [Cherished Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds) - [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements) - [ViaFabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus) - [TCDCommons API](https://modrinth.com/mod/tcdcommons) - [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) - [CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore) - [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) - [Full Brightness Toggle](https://modrinth.com/mod/full-brightness-toggle) - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - [Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud) - [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) - [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - [Better Tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettertab) - [No Telemetry](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-telemetry) - [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) - [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - [InvMove](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove) - [Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective) - [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) - [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) - [Jade 🔍](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) - [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) - [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) - [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - [Searchables](https://modrinth.com/mod/searchables) - [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - [ClickThrough Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/clickthrough+) - [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) - [Smooth Swapping](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-swapping) - [NoisiumForked](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisiumforked) - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - [Fast IP Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping)
---

“Just Vanilla — because sometimes, less is more.” 🍃
